name: Strike Fighter
description: A standard one-person strike fighter. Fast, hard to hit, but lightly armored.

name: Free Merchant
description: The workhorse of independent traders. Plentiful cargo space and reasonably priced.

name: Patrol Cruiser
description: Standard deep-space patrol vessel. Heavy armor and capable of mounting serious weaponry.

name: Battleship
description: A city in space, bristling with guns. Unbelievably expensive and practically unstoppable.
